title: Kudrjaschevia korshinskyi
taxonomy: Kudrjaschevia korshinskyi belongs to the family Lamiaceae and is a species of flowering plant. It is native to Central Asia. The plant is classified as an annual or biennial herb, with a growth habit of spreading or prostrate stems. Kudrjaschevia korshinskyi is further classified within the genus Kudrjaschevia, which is a small group of plants. The classification of Kudrjaschevia korshinskyi is still a subject of ongoing research and taxonomy in botany.
